x-enumeration-literals.name: Source Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accounts that hold or pledge assets as security, such as current, savings, or securities accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Beneficiary Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accounts of the lender or creditor whose exposure is protected by the collateral

x-enumeration-literals.name: Custodian Account
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accounts used by a custodian bank to hold and manage pledged securities or assets
